intentSynonyms: update a database item in notion
edit a database item in notion
change the details of database item in notion
modify a database item in notion
update a database row by setting property values in notion
description: Update a row/item in a Notion database. Use get_database first to understand the property schema.

page_id.description: Page/row ID (UUID) of the database item to update

properties.description: Property values as key-value pairs. Keys are property names (from get_database). Values are strings.
